productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Manitoba Piping Red Shirts
description: Style Note This shirt from wrangler is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making it an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories. Product Description Multi-coloured checked shirt, has a cutaway collar, full buttoned placket, short sleeves, patch pocket on the left chest, Wrangler branding appliquéd above the pocket and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
